title: Citrusy Tender Light Trout Salad
description: A refreshing Ukrainian dish featuring tender rainbow trout baked lightly with citrus accents for a raw-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Lemon Zest
ingredients.notes: Freshly grated from a whole lemon

ingredients.name: Garnish (optional)
ingredients.notes: Fresh mint leaves and edible flowers for decoration

instructions: Prepare the trout fillets by lightly brushing with olive oil, lemon zest, and orange slices.
Place the trout on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 8-10 minutes or until cooked through but still delicate in texture.
While the trout is baking, prepare your garnish of fresh mint leaves and edible flowers if desired.
Once done, remove from oven and let it rest for about 2 minutes before serving to allow the juices to settle.
Serve immediately over a bed of mixed greens or a light vinaigrette dressing as per your preference.
